series_metadata.series_title: Transit Capital Facilities, Facility Improvement and Real Property Acquisition
series_metadata.series_description: Documents regarding funding of transit projects to build facilities, improve facilities and acquire real estate. Documents that verify that the Ohio Department of Transportation maintains adequate continuing control of said facilities to the end of their useful life or when other disposition is approved. These documents are necessary for compliance with federal and state requirements regarding said facilities and real estate that are purchased using federal and state funds provided for the projects by the Ohio Department of Transportation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
